calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-05-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sean Brown (415.409.9481) Defendant in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court noted this is the second hearing with the tentative ruling posted for hearing required and no appearance is made on behalf of creditor. Mr. Brown stated he made an attempt to reach out to the creditor. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHASE MANHATAN BANK, USA, N.A.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION:
The judgment debtor's Claim of exemption is GRANTED. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2021 Continued To Oct-05-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Judgment Debtor SEAN D. BROWN (Tel: 415-409-9481) in pro per;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

PLAINTIFF CHASE MANHATAN BANK, USA, N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter discussed.

The Court continues this matter to October 5, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. with instructions to the parties that they meet and confer to attempt to reach a resolution.

The Court requests that Mr. Brown communicate to counsel for the judgment creditor when he meets and confers with counsel that the court expects counsel for the judgment creditor to be present at the October 5th hearing.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Discharged

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sean Brown, 415-409-9481 Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. The matter is called a first time to waitfor Plaintiff's Counsel. At 10:21 the matter is recalled. Defendant reports the Sheriff is holding a lot of money. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF SEAN BROWN.

Upheld/Granted. The Sheriff is directed to release any funds it may be holding to Defendant Sean Brown.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
